content.en:
This other side of the Xiao family's genius is named Xiao Miaoman, and he is titled the Lord of Mystery!

What is the strength of the Lord of Mystery, Ye Tian can't judge it at the moment, but it shouldn't be weak, after all, she has an ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, and she will definitely work hard to cultivate, and her strength will not be too bad.

Soon.

The chosen geniuses of the other side have all arrived here.

Ye Tian took a look, and there were a total of twenty-three other level heavens who would follow the Lord of Xuan Miao into that treasure land.

Soon.

The Xiao family's Origin Realm took the Lord of Mystery and Ye Tian and their other shore-level geniuses to that treasure land.

At this time, all the geniuses on the other side were looking forward to it.

After all, if they can enter that treasure land, they also hope to get a good chance!

Time passes slowly.

After some time, they finally arrived at their destination.

......

"This is it!"

The Xiao family's Ice Cave Master pointed to a twisting mountain range in front of him and said.

"Come in with me!"

The Lord of Mystery spoke.

Whoa!!

A group of other shore-level geniuses followed the Lord of Mystery into this twisted mountain range.

And after passing through, I realized that what I saw on the outside was not the same as what I saw inside.

The void here is large, and it also contains an eerie aura.

Suddenly, they became very cautious and protected the Lord of Mystery.

After all, their mission is to protect the Lord of the Mysteries.

If the Lord of Mystery fell, they would also be in trouble, and the Xiao family's Origin Upper Realm would definitely not spare them easily.

"Lord of Mystery, what is in this treasure land, you Xiao family should know something, right?"

A Shore-level genius asked.

The other other shore-level geniuses also looked at the Lord of Mystery, waiting for the Lord of Mystery's reply.

After all, the more you know about this place, the better you can protect the Lord of Mysteries!

The Lord of Mystery didn't continue to hide it, and said, "This treasure land has several special resources, such as a resource, the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side, this resource only needs a drop to restore our body that is about to collapse and eliminate the wounds of the foundation. For example, if we have cultivated the Golden Body Method of the Other Shore, once we fail, we can take the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore to recover. There is also a kind of resource - Xuyang Stone, which can refine Xuyang liquid in Xuyang Stone, which can quickly improve the will of the Origin Realm. "

"It turned out to be the Origin Bamboo Pulp and the Ruin Yang Stone on the other side!"

A group of other geniuses were amazed.

These two resources are extremely precious to them, and they can't be bought in the outside world, but they didn't expect them to be available here.

Moreover, if the Xiao family can pay a huge price to hire them to protect the Lord of Xuanmiao, then there must be a lot of Origin Bamboo Essence and Xuyang Stone on the other side here.

Then.

The Lord of Mystery said: "Our Xiao family only sent a group of primordial-level geniuses to come in and explore a little distance, so if there are more precious resources, it is not clear, we have to continue to explore." "

Due to the danger here, many other level geniuses were very careful.

After all, they don't want to fall, every other shore-level genius has a broad future, and they don't want to fall in such a place.

Once they fall, no amount of resources will be meaningless to them!

Soon.

They saw an endless sea of bamboo.

Each pillar here is the size of a world, and it contains infinite mysteries.

"It's the original bamboo on the other side!"

A genius from the other side was excited.

However, not every Origin Bamboo on the other side can give birth to the Origin Bamboo Pith on the other side, and it needs to be checked to know.

"Everyone, be careful, there may be a special creature hidden in the Origin Bamboo on the other side of this bamboo sea, and their strength is very strong, similar to that of an ordinary Ninth Bone Transformation Realm Genius on the other side. Our Xiao family sent more than a dozen primordial-level geniuses, almost all of them were damaged here, only one went back, and they died quickly. The Lord of Mystery reminded.

"It's supposed to be a void bamboo bee, right?"

A Shore-level genius asked.

"Yes, that's the creature!" the Lord of Mystery nodded.

Whoa!!

One by one, the other side level geniuses have entered this other side of the origin bamboo forest.

After entering, one after another level genius used the will of the Origin Realm to probe the void inside the Origin Bamboo on the other side.

The immeasurable will can't be explored, it can't just penetrate the Origin Bamboo on the other side, only the will of the Origin Realm can do it.

And the geniuses of the other side who came in this time all condensed the will of the primordial realm.

"Empty!"

"This one is empty too!"

"This one is empty too!"

Suddenly.

A giant void bamboo bee between the unreal and the real emerged from the inside of an Origin Bamboo on the other side and attacked a genius on the other side.

The Void Bamboo Bee's ability to attack and kill is terrifying, silent, fast, and specialized in breaking defenses.

However, if it was a Ninth Bone Transformation Realm primordial-level genius, if he was attacked by it like this, he would be directly killed by it in an instant.

However, he was attacking a Shore-level genius, and he was also a top-level Shore-level genius, so he naturally reacted.

Rumble!!!!

This other shore-level genius fought with this Void Bamboo Bee, although he could suppress the other party, but he couldn't kill the other party quickly.

The key is that once it can't be defeated, it can hide inside the Origin Bamboo on the other side.

The Void Bamboo Bee could ignore the Origin Bamboo on the other side and enter it easily, but the geniuses of the other side could not do so, and they had to take time to break through the Origin Bamboo on the other side, which gave it time to escape.

So, it's a bit difficult to kill a Void Bamboo Bee.

"Let's shoot it and kill it!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

Immediately, other other shore-level geniuses also made a move, and Ye Tian also made a move.

Rumble!!!!!

A magical skill on the other side of the door is on display.

Some of these Beyond Geniuses used the Divine Power to restrain the Lord Beyond the Shore, directly restraining the Void Bamboo Bee, making it unable to escape.

Followed by.

Ye Tian and the others shot together.

Rumble!!!

One attack after another bombarded the body of the Void Bamboo Bee, killing it instantly.

After killing the Void Bamboo Bee, the Lord of Mystery came over, broke the tail of the Void Bamboo Bee, and took out some Void Bamboo Honey from it.

"These Void Bamboo Honey, everyone share it, although it is not as good as the Void Origin Bamboo Essence, but it is also quite good!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

"Thank you, Lord of Mystery!"

Many other level geniuses thanked.

"You killed it in the first place, so it's naturally yours to divide it!" said the Lord of Mystic with a smile.

In fact, she doesn't look down on this bit of empty bamboo honey, and sharing it with them can also make them work harder!
